title: AI in Levellio
intro: Levellio works fully without AI. When you want a boost you're always in control — and your data stays yours.

onDevice.title: On-device · default
onDevice.body: Works entirely on your phone — instant, private, no account or internet needed. It personalizes quests with a lightweight on-device helper (not a large model), so it stays fast and fully private.

cloud.title: Cloud · your own key
cloud.body: Want richer suggestions? Add your own Gemini, OpenAI, or Anthropic key in Settings. You provide the key; we never see it — it's stored only in your phone's secure keychain.

coach.title: AI Coach · Plus
coach.body: Plus members can let AI enrich the “Confront your dragon” coaching using your cloud key. The curated coaching is always free.

local.title: Advanced · run a model on your phone
local.body: Power users can download an open model like Gemma in Google AI Edge Gallery and run it privately on your device. If you host a local OpenAI-compatible server, you can point the custom key endpoint at it. This is an optional setup outside the app.
local.steps: 1. Install Google AI Edge Gallery   2. Download a model (e.g. Gemma)   3. Chat privately on-device — nothing leaves your phone.
